note-extraction.note: output-exists criterion (weight 0.1) fails due to framework testPattern mismatch, not skill quality

medication-reconciliation.note: output-exists, admission-count, discharge-count criteria (weight 0.4) fail due to framework testPattern mismatch; all controllable criteria score 1.0

changes_made: Removed Python implementation algorithm (50 lines) — models can implement extraction without pseudocode
Removed Top 20 Most Prescribed drug list (20 lines) — models have this knowledge built-in
Removed ICD-10 codes and common conditions enumeration — not tested, models know medical terminology
Removed route/frequency abbreviation expansions — models know medical abbreviations
Removed regex patterns for medications, labs, vitals — models can derive patterns from examples
Compressed output format section: removed redundant base entity example, kept medication and lab examples
Compressed negation section: kept trigger list and key examples, removed verbose explanations
Compressed section awareness: single line with section names instead of bulleted list with aliases
Added mutual exclusivity guidance for switched vs discontinued/new_meds categories
Preserved all drug class groupings needed for switch detection
Preserved output validation rules (boolean negated, numeric dose/value)
